summary.en: Fast JSON encoding and decoding for Lua workloads that need stable structured text exchange.
summary.zh: 适合结构化文本交换场景的高性能 Lua JSON 编解码库。

en: This repository records package-level ownership and module names.
Function-level API help can be layered later without changing the package schema.
zh: 当前仓库先记录包级归属和模块名。
后续可以在不改包级 schema 的前提下继续补函数级帮助。
